title: NarrativeContract
description: Per-scene narrative contract. Defines the fixed anchors that the scene MUST touch, the core conflict that drives it, the whitelist of legal beats the Director may choose, the hard list of revelations that are FORBIDDEN, the turn / action budgets, the legal endings, and which causal seeds this scene can plant. This is the single most important LLM-guidance artifact: every Director proposal and every NPC proposal gets validated against the active contract before the Resolver considers it.

title.description: Display title for the scene; surfaced to the player when the scene starts.

era.description: Historical era tag. Determines which cultural/linguistic register the LLM is allowed to use. Accepts the 13 canonical Era values plus the case-scoped shorthands from server.engine.types.CASE_ERAS (ADR 0007, P0-7).

location.description: In-fiction location, e.g. '革命街24号·林九旧宅·二楼'.

timeOfDay.description: Optional time-of-day; affects lighting / tone prompts.

initialDisposition.description: Starting relationship disposition toward the protagonist.

cast.description: Cast list with narrative roles. Off-stage characters can be referenced but not directly addressed.

mandatory.description: If true, the scene cannot end without this anchor being hit.

required_anchors.description: Fixed narrative beats the Director MUST traverse. Resolver rejects scene-end proposals that haven't covered all mandatory anchors.

core_conflict.description: One-sentence (or short paragraph) statement of the central tension in this scene. Used as system-prompt anchor for NPC agents.

tier.description: Narrative tier the beat belongs to. Director uses tier pressure to pace the scene.

prerequisites.description: Other beatIds that must have fired before this one is selectable.

allowed_beats.description: Whitelist of beats the Director is allowed to choose. Anything outside this list is rejected.

forbidden_reveals.description: Information that MUST NOT be surfaced in this scene. Director.proposal.forbiddenRevealsChecked must list every entry here.

max_turns.description: Hard cap on player turns in this scene. Resolver forces a legal_ending if exceeded.

total_action_budget.description: Sum of (player + NPC + director) actions allowed in this scene.

conditions.description: Predicate strings the Resolver evaluates; all must be true to fire the ending.

legal_endings.description: Whitelist of scene endings. Resolver refuses any 'end_run' transition that does not reference one of these IDs.

causal_seeds.description: Causal seed IDs that this scene is allowed to plant. Resolver drops any newCausalSeeds not in this list.

id.description: Unique mandatory echo identifier, e.g. 'first_words_admit_2008_2011' or 'admit_1985_behaviors_5_candidate_lines'.

trigger.description: Trigger condition description (free-form, resolved by Director / Resolver).

target_scenes.description: Scenes where this echo may fire.

ai_director_must_invoke.description: If true, the Director must invoke this echo (no AI freedom; 决策 3).

references_1985.description: Seed IDs from the 1985/1986/1989 era that this echo references (UP-20260715-015).

references_2008.description: Seed IDs from photo_lab_2008 that this echo references.

references_2011.description: Seed IDs from farewell_2011 that this echo references.

ai_director_constraint.description: Hard constraint on the Director (no AI freedom for the echo content).

text.description: The line text — what the NPC says.

seed_id.description: Primary seed id this line references (UP-20260715-015 unified schema).

referenced_seed.description: Alias of seed_id; kept for compatibility with W4 reunion_2024 schema.

priority.description: Selection priority — 1 = highest (most touching). selection_rule picks the lowest priority line that matches the player's triggered seeds.

candidate_lines.description: Pre-approved candidate lines for this echo. The selection_rule chooses ONE based on the player's triggered seeds; AI Director must NOT create lines outside this list (UP-20260715-015 red line).

conditional_replay_lines.description: Strict conditional replay lines attached to an existing mandatory echo. They are excluded from candidate_lines selection, priority ordering, and fallback counts.

first_line_rule.description: Deterministic first-line policy chosen by UP-20260715-021: walk candidate_lines by ascending priority and select the first seed match.

no_match_fallback.description: Deterministic line_id used when no candidate seed matches (UP-20260715-020).

algorithm.description: Multi-line text describing the selection algorithm (priority asc, take first match).

red_line.description: Red line that the AI Director must NOT cross (e.g. 'AI 导演不得在 candidate_lines 之外创造台词').

selection_rule.description: Deterministic first-match and fallback policy, selection algorithm, and red line. Drives the NPC Agent's run-time choice of which candidate_line to fire.

mandatory_echoes.description: Mandatory echoes that the scene MUST fire (决策 3: 显式登记机制). At least one echo is required to carry `candidate_lines` + `selection_rule` when the scene has a 'first words admit' moment (UP-20260715-015 3-scene 5 句备选统一). The candidate_lines shape is { line_id, text, speaker, seed_id, priority } (plus era-anchored aliases).

narratorVoice.description: Optional narrator voice preset. Default = 'default_third_person_observer' (third-person limited, period-appropriate vernacular). 'observer_leila' / 'observer_arash' unlock Leila's / Arash's viewpoint — paid unlock (决策 4 ¥3/段). When set, the narrator voice shifts from '你看到了 X' to '莱拉当时以为 X' / '阿拉什当时以为 X', revealing what the other half didn't know (UP-20260715-004). The enum is closed; custom style notes are not allowed at the schema level so the cost & UX gates can index by name.
